team:review-signoff.description: Engineering owner reviewed the change and signed off.

planner.description: Clarifies product capability, constraints, non-goals, and implementation handoff.

engineer.description: Implements the approved capability with tests and focused code changes.

reviewer.description: Reviews code quality, correctness, maintainability, and security-sensitive changes.

release-manager.description: Prepares release notes, verifies evidence, and asks for final human approval.

gates.description: All blocking product questions have an owner or answer.
Scope boundaries are documented before implementation starts.
Run coverage checks and verify the configured threshold.
Security review found no unresolved critical issues.
Code review found no unresolved high-severity correctness issues.
Test, review, and approval evidence is attached to the release packet.
A human lead approved release or external publication.
